Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: As per the NPRI Guidance, the quantify manufactured, processed, or otherwise (MPO) used is not reported to the NPRI. Instead if the MPO threshold is met, the quantity of the substance released, disposed of, or transferred off-site for recycling is required to be reported, even if the quantity is zero. This is the case for this substance.

comments.comment:
QC Note: There is a significant increase in releases reported in 2021 compared to previous years. Please provide further justification for the change, and/or update the value as required.
Response: The reported fugitive number in 2021 is accurate. The sum of all Pod One fugitive gas leaks in 2021 was 31.9410 e3m3/yr in 2021 vs. 12.0 e3m3/yr in 2020.
